title: Master the Strangler Fig Pattern
description: Architect the incremental replacement of legacy monoliths using the Strangler Fig Pattern. Design traffic routing strategies via load balancers to gradually shift load to new microservices. Implement a phased migration approach to minimize risk during architectural transitions.
objectives: Architect the incremental replacement of legacy monoliths using the Strangler Fig Pattern.
Design traffic routing strategies via load balancers to gradually shift load to new microservices.
Implement a phased migration approach to minimize risk during architectural transitions.
